subject: physics
title: 20N.3.SL.TZ0.13
question_html: A single pulse of light enters an optic fibre which contains small impurities that scatter the light. Explain the effect of these impurities on the pulse.
solution_html:
mention of attenuation ✓

mention of dispersion or pulse broadening ✓

gives explanation for at least one of above ✓
